footer.tagline: The trusted marketplace for equipment rental
footer.description: Connect with local equipment owners. Rent what you need, when you need it.
footer.madeWith: Made with love for equipment owners and renters

home.heroTitle: Rent equipment from trusted owners near you
home.heroSubtitle: Construction gear, sports kits, event setups, and tools — book in minutes with secure payments.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Find exactly what you need across our growing catalog
home.howSubtitle: Rent or earn in three simple steps
home.howStep1Body: Browse thousands of listings. Filter by category, location, and price.
home.howStep2Body: Reserve dates, pay safely, and coordinate pickup or delivery.
home.howStep3Body: Enjoy your rental period. Return on time and leave a review.
home.ctaBody: Turn idle gear into income. Join owners across Tunisia.
home.featuredRecentSubtitle: New gear added by owners across Tunisia
home.featuredEmptyHint: Check back soon — new gear is added every day.
home.trustQuote: I rented a concrete mixer for a weekend project. The process was seamless and the owner was incredibly helpful.
home.trustFeatureSecureBody: Your deposit is held safely until the return is confirmed.
home.trustFeatureVerifiedBody: Every owner completes KYC before listing equipment.
home.trustFeatureDeliveryBody: Equipment delivered and picked up from your door.
home.ctaBodyLong: List it on {{name}} and earn from your tools, gear, and machinery — only when you get booked.
home.ctaFinePrint: Free to list · No subscription · Pay only when you earn
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Real stories from people who booked equipment on Ekri
home.testimonial1Quote: I rented a concrete mixer for a weekend project. The process was seamless and the owner was incredibly helpful.
home.testimonial2Quote: We needed football goals for a school tournament. Booking and pickup were easy, and the gear was in great shape.
home.testimonial3Quote: The party tent saved our outdoor event when the weather turned. Clear pricing and fast confirmation.

auth.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and privacy policy

auth.blockedAccount: Your account has been suspended. Please contact support.
auth.registerSidebar: Rent anything from trusted local owners
auth.termsReadHint: Read and accept the Terms in our modal before checking this box.
auth.loginPanelTitle: Welcome back to Tunisia's equipment marketplace
auth.loginPanelSubtitle: Sign in to manage bookings, list your gear, and connect with trusted renters and owners.
auth.verifyEmailSent: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Verify your email to continue.
auth.signInAgreePrefix: By signing in you agree to our
auth.registerPanelSubtitle: Create your free account in minutes — rent what you need or earn by listing your gear.
auth.registerStatUsers: Renters and owners across Tunisia trust Ekri for local equipment.

search.title: Search equipment
search.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting filters or search terms

bookings.title: My bookings
bookings.subtitleOwner: Track rentals you've made and manage requests for your equipment.
bookings.subtitleRenter: Track equipment you've rented and follow each booking from request to return.
bookings.noRentalsHint: Browse listings and send your first booking request.
bookings.noIncomingHint: List equipment to start receiving booking requests.
bookings.paymentSuccess: Payment received — your rental is now active!
bookings.paymentCancelled: Payment cancelled. You can try again when ready.
bookings.bannerPendingSubtitle: The owner will approve or decline shortly.
bookings.bannerConfirmedSubtitle: Complete payment to lock in your rental.
bookings.bannerPaymentSubtitle: Use the button below — your rental begins right after payment.
bookings.bannerPaidSubtitle: Owner can start the rental, or it may already be active.
bookings.bannerActiveSubtitle: Coordinate pickup with the owner. Tap Complete rental when finished.
bookings.bannerActiveReturnSubtitle: Tap Complete rental when the equipment is returned.
bookings.bannerCompletedSubtitle: This rental is closed — thank you for using the platform.
bookings.bannerDisputedSubtitle: Our team may reach out for more information.
bookings.bannerRejectedSubtitle: This booking did not go ahead.
bookings.bannerRefundedSubtitle: Funds have been returned according to policy.
bookings.pickupReturnBody: Arrange handoff directly with {{party}} at {{location}}. No separate delivery scheduling — one payment starts the rental, one button completes it.
bookings.reviewOwnerDesc: Share feedback about the host. Visible after admin approval.
bookings.reviewEquipmentDesc: Rate the listing and equipment condition.
bookings.bookingRequestsDesc: Review, approve, and manage rentals for your equipment.
bookings.noBookingsAllHint: New requests from renters will show up here.
bookings.noBookingsFilterHint: Try another filter to see more bookings.
bookings.notesPlaceholder: Any special requirements or questions for the owner?

profile.title: Profile
profile.photoHint: Tap the photo or camera to change your picture.
profile.renterSubtitle: Update your name, contact details, and profile photo. Renters don't need identity verification or a public host page.
profile.ownerSubtitle: Manage your account and how others see you on {{name}}.
profile.coverHint: Wide banner shown at the top of your public profile. Recommended 1200×400px or larger.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell renters about your experience, equipment, and service area…
profile.notFound: This profile could not be found.
profile.renterOnlyBody: This member rents equipment on {{name}}. Public host profiles are only available for equipment owners.
profile.publishFromDashboard: Publish your first listing from the dashboard to show it here.
profile.ownerNoEquipment: This owner has not published any available equipment yet.
profile.reviewsHostSubtitle: Host feedback and reviews on this owner's listings.
profile.reviewOwnerDesc: Share your experience working with this host. Owners can also review each other.
profile.noReviewsHostBody: Be the first to leave a review after renting or interacting with this host.
profile.defaultBio: {{name}} rents out quality equipment on {{platform}}. Browse their listings below and book with confidence.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Questions, feedback, or issues — we read every message.
contact.name: Your name
contact.subject: Subject

legal.englishNotice: The full legal text below is provided in English. Contact us if you need assistance in French or Arabic.
legal.termsDesc: Rules for using {{name}} as a renter, owner, or both.
legal.privacyDesc: How {{name}} collects, uses, and protects your data.
legal.cookiesDesc: How we use cookies and similar technologies.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.

equipment.notFound: This equipment may have been removed.
equipment.pendingHint: Renters cannot find this until an admin approves it. You'll get a notification when it's ready.
equipment.rejectedHint: Update your listing and save to resubmit for review.
equipment.reviewSubtitle: Rate the equipment. Your review appears after admin approval.
equipment.firstReview: Be the first to review this listing.
equipment.managePendingBody: Submitted for review. You can preview it here; it won't appear in search until approved.
equipment.manageRejectedBody: Edit this listing from My Listings and save to resubmit for review.
equipment.manageApprovedBody: Toggle visibility or delete from My Listings.

dashboardPage.ownerSubtitle: Here's how your listings and earnings are performing.
dashboardPage.renterSubtitle: Track your rentals, payments, and booking status in one place.
dashboardPage.kycSubmitted: Your document is under review. You'll be notified within 24–48 hours.
dashboardPage.kycUpload: Upload your ID to start listing equipment and earning.
dashboardPage.noRentalsHint: Find equipment on the marketplace and send your first booking request.
dashboardPage.listEquipmentBody: Owners get a public profile, listings, earnings dashboard, and identity verification. Contact us if you'd like to upgrade your account to list gear.
dashboardPage.noBookingsHint: Requests from renters will appear here.
dashboardPage.earningsDesc: Track gross revenue, platform fees, and net payouts from completed rentals.
dashboardPage.noEarningsHint: Completed rentals will show up here with net amounts after fees.

charts.earningsSubtitle: Net revenue over the last 6 months
charts.noEarnings: No completed rentals yet. Earnings will appear here.
charts.requestsLast7: {{count}} new requests in the last 7 days
charts.completeToRank: Complete rentals to see performance rankings.

listing.newSubtitle: Add photos and rates, then submit for review. Once an admin approves your listing, you can make it visible in search.
listing.myListingsSubtitle: Manage availability, edit details, and track approval status.
listing.noListingsHint: List your first piece of equipment to start earning.
listing.deleteBody: This cannot be undone. Active bookings may be affected.
listing.sectionBasicsDesc: What are you renting? A clear title and description help renters decide.
listing.descriptionPlaceholder: Condition, what's included, pickup notes, rules…
listing.sectionPricingDesc: Set your daily rate in Tunisian dinars (TND). Weekly rate is optional.
listing.sectionLocationDesc: Where can renters pick up the equipment?
listing.sectionPhotosDesc: Good photos get more bookings. The first image is your cover.
listing.reviewHint: New listings are reviewed by our team before they appear in search. After approval, use the visibility toggle to go live.
listing.firstListingSubtitle: Publish your first piece of equipment to start earning.
listing.noCategories: No categories available yet. Ask an admin to add categories.
listing.depositHeldHint: Held until the item is returned
listing.photosUploadHint: JPG, PNG, WebP · Max 10MB each · First photo is the cover
listing.editAnytimeHint: You can edit your listing anytime from My Listings.
listing.editToResubmit: Edit listing to resubmit for review
listing.turnOnToGoLive: Approved — turn on to go live

bookingCard.completePayment: Complete payment to confirm your rental.

kyc.renterOnly: Identity verification is only required if you list equipment as an owner.
kyc.submittedAgo: Submitted {{ago}}. You will be notified within 24–48 hours.
kyc.acceptedFormats: Accepted: JPG, PNG, WebP, PDF · up to 20MB. Must show full name and photo clearly (for ID cards).
kyc.uploadHint: National ID, passport, or driving license
kyc.title: Identity verification
kyc.body: Owners must verify their identity before listing equipment. Upload a clear photo or PDF of your government-issued ID.
kyc.listingDisabled: Listing is disabled until an admin approves your document ({{status}}).
